title: 科学课
description: Science class — doing a simple experiment, observing plants, and asking why things happen

dialogues.speaker: CHARACTER
dialogues.textChinese: 同学们！今天科学课，我们来做实验！你喜欢科学吗？
dialogues.textPinyin: Tóngxuémen! Jīntiān kēxuékè, wǒmen lái zuò shíyàn! Nǐ xǐhuān kēxué ma?
dialogues.textEnglish: Classmates! Today in science class we are going to do an experiment! Do you like science?
dialogues.textIndonesian: Teman-teman! Hari ini pelajaran sains, kita akan melakukan percobaan! Kamu suka sains?

pinyinWords.note: 科学 means science — 科 means branch of study, 学 means study/learning. 科学 = systematic study = science!

options.chinese: 喜欢！科学很有趣！我想知道为什么！
options.pinyin: Xǐhuān! Kēxué hěn yǒuqù! Wǒ xiǎng zhīdào wèishénme!
options.english: Yes! Science is so interesting! I want to know why!
options.indonesian: Suka! Sains sangat menarik! Saya ingin tahu kenapa!

pinyinWords.note: 有趣 (yǒuqù) means interesting or fun. 很有趣！= very interesting! You can use this for anything you find fascinating.

options.chinese: 有时候很难，但是很好玩！
options.pinyin: Yǒushíhou hěn nán, dànshì hěn hǎowán!
options.english: Sometimes it is hard, but it is very fun!

dialogues.speaker: CHARACTER
dialogues.textChinese: 很好！今天我们来观察植物。这是一颗种子。种到土里，会长出什么？
dialogues.textPinyin: Hěn hǎo! Jīntiān wǒmen lái guānchá zhíwù. Zhè shì yī kē zhǒngzi. Zhòng dào tǔ lǐ, huì zhǎng chū shénme?
dialogues.textEnglish: Very good! Today we will observe plants. This is a seed. If we plant it in soil, what will grow?
dialogues.textIndonesian: Bagus! Hari ini kita akan mengamati tanaman. Ini adalah sebutir biji. Kalau ditanam ke tanah, apa yang akan tumbuh?

pinyinWords.note: 观察 means to observe carefully — like a scientist watching what happens. 观 = watch, 察 = inspect.
颗 (kē) is the counter word for small round things like seeds, pearls, or teeth. 一颗种子 = one seed!

options.chinese: 会长出植物！种子需要水和阳光！
options.pinyin: Huì zhǎng chū zhíwù! Zhǒngzi xūyào shuǐ hé yángguāng!
options.english: A plant will grow! Seeds need water and sunlight!
options.indonesian: Akan tumbuh tanaman! Biji perlu air dan sinar matahari!

dialogues.speaker: CHARACTER
dialogues.textChinese: 太棒了！你说得对！植物需要水、阳光和土。科学是不是很有趣？
dialogues.textPinyin: Tài bàng le! Nǐ shuō de duì! Zhíwù xūyào shuǐ, yángguāng hé tǔ. Kēxué shì bu shì hěn yǒuqù?
dialogues.textEnglish: Wonderful! You are correct! Plants need water, sunlight and soil. Is science not very interesting?
dialogues.textIndonesian: Luar biasa! Kamu benar! Tanaman perlu air, sinar matahari dan tanah. Sains menarik kan?

pinyinWords.english: you said it correctly / you are right

options.pinyin: Shì! Wǒ zhǎng dà xiǎng dāng kēxuéjiā!
options.english: Yes! When I grow up I want to be a scientist!
options.indonesian: Iya! Saya besar mau jadi ilmuwan!

pinyinWords.note: 家 at the end of a profession word means a person who is an expert in that field. 科学家 = scientist, 音乐家 = musician, 画家 = painter!

options.chinese: 很有趣！我还有很多问题！
options.pinyin: Hěn yǒuqù! Wǒ hái yǒu hěn duō wèntí!
options.english: Very interesting! I still have so many questions!
options.indonesian: Sangat menarik! Saya masih punya banyak pertanyaan!

pinyinWords.pinyin: Wǒ hái yǒu hěn duō wèntí

dialogues.speaker: CHARACTER
dialogues.textChinese: 好！问题越多越好！科学家就是要多问为什么！做得好，同学们！
dialogues.textPinyin: Hǎo! Wèntí yuè duō yuè hǎo! Kēxuéjiā jiù shì yào duō wèn wèishénme! Zuò de hǎo, tóngxuémen!
dialogues.textEnglish: Good! The more questions the better! Scientists need to ask why a lot! Well done, classmates!
dialogues.textIndonesian: Bagus! Semakin banyak pertanyaan semakin baik! Ilmuwan memang harus banyak bertanya kenapa! Kerja bagus, teman-teman!

pinyinWords.note: 越...越... is a great pattern! It means 'the more... the more...'. 越多越好 = the more the better!

quizQuestions.explanation: 科学 (kēxué) means science! Scientists ask 为什么 (why) about everything. Be curious!

quizQuestions.questionText: How do you say 'experiment' in Mandarin?
quizQuestions.explanation: 实验 (shíyàn) means experiment! Scientists do 实验 to test their ideas and find answers.
植物 (zhíwù) means plant! Plants need 水 (water), 阳光 (sunlight) and 土 (soil) to grow.

quizQuestions.questionText: Listen and choose the correct meaning!
quizQuestions.explanation: 有趣 (yǒuqù) means interesting or fun! 科学很有趣！= Science is very interesting!
